const newTask = reactive<NewTask>({
  title: '',
  description: '',
  priority: undefined,
  dueDate: undefined,
  status: '',
  labels: undefined,
})

return {
  register,
  authenticate,
  isSupported,
  isAutofillSupported: browserSupportsWebAuthnAutofill,
  isPlatformAvailable: platformAuthenticatorIsAvailable,
}

switch (value) {
  case 'true':
  case true:
    return true
  case 'false':
  case false:
    return false
}
